test.name: Locality guide for Louisiana, 1700s — French colonial records
test.description: Checks if the skill recognizes Louisiana under French rule and directs researchers to parish registers, land grants, and colonial court records.

input.user_message: I’m researching ancestors in Louisiana during the French colonial period (1700s). What records or repositories would help trace families?

judge_context: Must mention Louisiana under French colonial rule. Must highlight parish registers, land grants, and colonial court records. Must not suggest U.S. state vital records for the 1700s.
